toolSpec.name: describe_cluster_operation
toolSpec.description: Gets information about a cluster operation.

cluster_operation_arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the cluster operation

toolSpec.name: get_cluster_info
toolSpec.description: Gets comprehensive information about MSK clusters.

cluster_arn.description: The ARN of the cluster to get information for

info_type.description: Type of information to retrieve (metadata, brokers, nodes, compatible_versions, policy, operations, client_vpc_connections, scram_secrets, all)

kwargs.description: Additional arguments specific to each info type

toolSpec.name: get_global_info
toolSpec.description: Gets global information about MSK resources.

info_type.description: Type of information to retrieve (clusters, configurations, vpc_connections, kafka_versions, all)

kwargs.description: Additional arguments specific to each info type

toolSpec.name: describe_vpc_connection
toolSpec.description: Gets detailed information about a VPC connection.

vpc_connection_arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the VPC connection

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the configuration

kwargs.description: Additional arguments based on the action

toolSpec.name: list_tags_for_resource
toolSpec.description: Lists all tags for an MSK resource.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the resource

toolSpec.name: list_topics
toolSpec.description: Returns all topics in an MSK cluster.

cluster_arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) that uniquely identifies the cluster

topic_name_filter.description: Returns topics starting with given name

max_results.description: The maximum number of results to return in the response (default maximum 100 results per API call)

next_token.description: The paginated results marker. When the result of the operation is truncated, the call returns NextToken in the response

toolSpec.name: describe_topic
toolSpec.description: Returns details for a specific topic on an MSK cluster.

cluster_arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) that uniquely identifies the cluster

topic_name.description: The name of the topic to describe

toolSpec.name: describe_topic_partitions
toolSpec.description: Returns partition information for a specific topic on an MSK cluster.

cluster_arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) that uniquely identifies the cluster

topic_name.description: The name of the topic to describe partitions for

max_results.description: Maximum number of partitions to return

toolSpec.name: get_cluster_telemetry
toolSpec.description: Gets telemetry data for MSK clusters.

cluster_arn.description: The ARN of the cluster (required for cluster operations)

kwargs.description: Additional arguments based on the action type

toolSpec.name: list_customer_iam_access
toolSpec.description: Lists IAM access information for an MSK cluster.

cluster_arn.description: The ARN of the MSK cluster

toolSpec.name: get_cluster_best_practices
toolSpec.description: Gets best practices and quotas for AWS MSK clusters.

instance_type.description: The AWS MSK broker instance type (e.g., kafka.m5.large, kafka.m5.xlarge, express.m7g.large)

number_of_brokers.description: The total number of brokers in the MSK cluster
